mapper.sql: id, type, parent_id, title, url, icon, sort_order
mapper.select: select from menus order by type, sort_order, id
mapper.insert: insert into menus (type, parent_id, title, url, icon, sort_order) values (#{type}, #{parentId}, #{title}, #{url}, #{icon}, #{sort})
mapper.update: update menus set parent_id = null where parent_id = #{id}
